name: Intent route decision
description: Decision for routing a global human message to a durable intent, a new intent, or a human clarification.

intentId.description: Candidate intent id to route to when decision is routeToIntent; otherwise empty string.

candidateIntentIds.description: Relevant candidate ids for clarification; empty unless decision is askHuman.

clarificationQuestion.description: Question to show the human when decision is askHuman; otherwise empty string.
